detailed_results.question: What is PM-KISAN and how much money do farmers get?
detailed_results.answer_preview: PM-KISAN provides income support of Rs. 6,000 per year to all land holding farmer families across the country. The amount is paid in three equal installments of Rs. 2,000 each....
detailed_results.ground_truth: PM-KISAN provides income support of Rs. 6000 per year to farmer families in three installments of Rs. 2000 each directly into bank accounts.

detailed_results.question: What is the health coverage amount under Ayushman Bharat?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The health coverage amount under Ayushman Bharat is Rs. 5 lakh per family per year....
detailed_results.ground_truth: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY provides health coverage of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

detailed_results.question: What are the MUDRA loan categories and amounts?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY) has three categories of loans: Shishu (loans up to Rs. 50,000), Kishore (loans from Rs. 50,001 to Rs. 5 lakh), and Tarun (loans from Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh)....
detailed_results.ground_truth: MUDRA has three categories: Shishu loans up to Rs. 50000, Kishore loans from Rs. 50001 to Rs. 5 lakh, and Tarun loans from Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh.

detailed_results.question: How many days of employment does MGNREGS guarantee?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS) guarantees at least 100 days of employment per household per year....
detailed_results.ground_truth: MGNREGS guarantees at least 100 days of wage employment per household per year to rural households.

detailed_results.question: What is the annual premium for PMSBY accident insurance?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The annual premium for Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) accident insurance is Rs. 20 per year....
detailed_results.ground_truth: The premium for PMSBY is only Rs. 20 per year for accident insurance coverage of Rs. 2 lakh.

detailed_results.question: Who is eligible for Sukanya Samridhi Yojana?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The Sukanya Samridhi Yojana is eligible for a girl child below 10 years of age....
detailed_results.ground_truth: Sukanya Samridhi Yojana is for girl children below 10 years of age, with maximum two accounts per family.

detailed_results.question: What loans does PM SVANidhi provide to street vendors?
detailed_results.answer_preview: PM SVANidhi provides an initial loan of Rs. 10,000 without collateral, and on timely repayment, eligible vendors can get a loan of Rs. 20,000 and further eligible for a loan of Rs. 50,000....
detailed_results.ground_truth: PM SVANidhi provides initial loan of Rs. 10000, then Rs. 20000 on timely repayment, and further Rs. 50000 without collateral.

detailed_results.question: What is the guaranteed pension amount under Atal Pension Yojana APY?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The guaranteed pension amount under Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 per month....
detailed_results.ground_truth: Atal Pension Yojana provides guaranteed pension of Rs. 1000 to Rs. 5000 per month after age 60.

detailed_results.question: What benefits does Ujjwala Yojana provide to BPL women?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) provides a free LPG connection with stove and first refill, along with financial assistance of Rs. 1,600 per connection to BPL women....
detailed_results.ground_truth: Ujjwala Yojana provides free LPG connection with stove and first refill along with financial assistance of Rs. 1600 to BPL women.

detailed_results.question: What is the subsidy percentage under PMEGP for rural SC/ST applicants?
detailed_results.answer_preview: The subsidy percentage under PMEGP for rural SC/ST applicants is 35%....
detailed_results.ground_truth: Under PMEGP, special category SC/ST applicants in rural areas get 35% subsidy on project cost.
